practices.name: Pool Search Memory
practices.description: Search stored memory records in the filesystem pool.

practices.name: Pool Create Table
practices.description: Create a table directory in the filesystem pool.

practices.name: Pool Get Table Data
practices.description: Read rows from a filesystem-backed table.

practices.name: Get Pulse Data
practices.description: Fetch or transform pulse payloads for the agent's supported pulses.

pulse_name.description: Optional pulse identifier. Defaults to the pulser's primary pulse.

url.description: HTTP(S) URL or file:// URL to load.

local_path.description: Absolute or relative filesystem path to load.

practices.name: Pool Disconnect
practices.description: Mark the filesystem pool as disconnected.

practices.name: Mailbox
practices.description: Default inbound message endpoint for generic agent delivery.

practices.name: Pool Query
practices.description: Execute a query against the filesystem pool adapter.

practices.name: Pool Insert
practices.description: Insert or replace one JSON row in the filesystem pool.

practices.name: Pool Store Memory
practices.description: Store one memory record in the filesystem pool.

practices.name: Pool Table Exists
practices.description: Check whether a filesystem-backed table exists.
